entries.signature: public bool GetSegment (float start, float stop, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, bool startWithMoveTo);

fields.summary: Extracts a segment of the path between the specified distances and writes it into the destination path builder.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if a non-empty segment was extracted; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the extracted segment.
params.stop: The distance along the path at which the segment ends.
params.start: The distance along the path at which the segment begins.
params.startWithMoveTo: true to start the segment with a move-to command; false to omit it.
